source_path: docs/md/GTA IV ScriptHook.Net Single File Documentation.md
rationale: Curated archive preserves the legacy monolithic export even though the real CHM decompile does not emit a standalone HTML page for it.
The supported docs landing page is a curated overview; the CHM decompile does not emit a standalone root index HTML page.
The misc namespace landing page is a generated navigation bucket, not a standalone decompiled CHM HTML page.
The archival TOC is retained for reference, while the real CHM decompile does not produce a dedicated TOC.html page.
